case_title: PALMER, SHIRLEY vs. NORTH AMERICAN ENTERTAINMENT, A PARTNERSHIP et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALMER, SHIRLEY AS TO DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN ENTERTAINMENT, A PARTNERSHIP DAHLE, STEVE, INDIVIDUALLY

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PALMER, SHIRLEY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NORTH AMERICAN ENTERTAINMENT, A PARTNERSHIP DAHLE, STEVE, INDIVIDUALLY $1,714.95 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,794.95
